description: AI agents for retail banking — high volume, lower complexity. Conversational banking, smart recommendations, onboarding automation, fraud triage.

agents.name: Smart Product Recommendations
agents.description: Context-aware product recommendations in mobile/online app based on transaction patterns, life events, and financial goals.
agents.value_narrative: Personalised cross-sell at scale — drives product holding ratio

agents.name: Proactive Financial Alerts
agents.description: Intelligent alerting: unusual spending, savings goal progress, bill payment reminders, rate change notifications.
agents.value_narrative: Engagement driver — increases app sessions and digital adoption

agents.name: Intelligent App Search
agents.description: Natural language search across accounts, transactions, help articles, and product catalog.
agents.value_narrative: Reduces support calls for basic enquiries

agents.name: Customer Conversational Banking
agents.description: Customer-facing conversational AI for self-service banking — balance enquiries, transfers, card management, FAQ resolution.
agents.value_narrative: Call deflection — each resolved conversation saves $5-8 vs contact centre

agents.name: Employee Workspace Assistant
agents.description: Agent-facing conversational AI — pulls client info, suggests actions, drafts responses, provides policy guidance.
agents.value_narrative: Reduces average handle time by 2-3 minutes per interaction

agents.name: Digital Onboarding Automation
agents.description: End-to-end digital account opening: ID verification, KYC checks, risk scoring, account provisioning.

agents.name: Dispute Triage Agent
agents.description: Classifies disputes, gathers evidence, routes to resolution path. Handles chargebacks, billing errors, fraud claims.
agents.value_narrative: Automates 60% of dispute classification and evidence gathering

agents.name: Fraud Alert Triage Agent
agents.description: Triages fraud alerts — scores confidence, enriches with transaction context, auto-resolves clear false positives.
agents.value_narrative: Reduces false positive investigation load by 40-60%

agents.name: SAR Narrative Generator
agents.description: Generates Suspicious Activity Report narratives from case data — transaction patterns, entity links, risk indicators.
agents.value_narrative: SAR drafting from 4 hours to 30 minutes per case

agents.name: Loan Decision Assistant
agents.description: Pre-screens loan applications — income verification, affordability check, credit risk scoring, decision recommendation.
agents.value_narrative: Accelerates loan decisioning from days to minutes
